handoff.reason: Strict plan ready for phased execution

execution_rules.phase_gate: hard-stop after each phase — tsc --noEmit and vitest must both pass before advancing
execution_rules.rollback: git checkout HEAD -- src/ to revert any phase if compilation fails

hard_constraints: Delete src/analyzer/graph-builder.ts only after ALL imports are cleared (Phase 4)
All 14 consumers must compile cleanly before proceeding to deletion
vitest must pass after each phase

blockers.description: Phase 4 deletion blocked: internal src/analyzer/ files and __tests__/ files still import from graph-builder.ts. Deleting would break compilation.
options: (A) Expand scope: migrate internal analyzer/ files and test files — larger blast radius, requires a new plan phase
(B) Defer deletion: treat Phase 4 as out-of-scope for this workorder, close with 14 consumers migrated, file a follow-on stub for the deletion
(C) Partial deletion: replace graph-builder.ts with a re-export shim that re-exports only what internal files need, preserving internal compatibility

communication_log.summary: Strict 4-phase plan created from STUB-309 / IMP-CORE-094. 14 consumers across 5 layers migrated off deprecated analyzer/graph-builder.ts in complexity-ordered phases.
fuzzy-resolver.ts, ai-prompt-generator.ts, query-executor.ts migrated to ExportedGraph['nodes'][number] type alias. tsc: 0 errors. vitest: 1567/1567. Commit: 36b5b13.

5 RAG consumers migrated: answer-generation-service + incremental-indexer via ExportedGraph alias; chunk-converter, graph-reranker, semantic-search via local shim (Map-based surface). tsc: 0 errors. vitest: 1567/1567. Commit: fa2b584.

6 high-complexity consumers migrated via local shim: graph-to-elements, impact-simulator, multi-hop-traversal (with GraphAnalyzer cast), graph-exporter, plugin-graph, indexing-orchestrator. 3 test files in src/integration/rag/__tests__/ also migrated. tsc: 0 errors. vitest: 1567/1567. Commit: 9105483.
BLOCK-001: deletion blocked by internal src/analyzer/ files and __tests__/ root test files. Awaiting user ruling: (A) expand scope, (B) defer deletion, (C) re-export shim.

User chose (B) defer deletion. STUB-311 filed for delete-analyzer-graph-builder. All 14 external consumers migrated across phases 1-3. Phase 4 deletion deferred to STUB-311. Workorder complete with deferred phase 4.
communication_log.plan_deviation: ADJ-01: Phase 4 deletion deferred — 9 internal src/analyzer/ files and root __tests__/ files remain as consumers. Filed STUB-311 for follow-on work.
